title: Ningaloo Caravan and Holiday Resort
description: Rustic chalets, houses and dorms on a 9-hectare property with dining, a pool and boat tours.
hotelDescription:
On a 9-hectare property , this rustic resort with chalets is 5.6 km from the Exmouth beaches and 50 km from Cape Range National Park.
 The casual chalets feature free Wi-Fi, TVs, DVD players and lounge/dining areas, plus kitchens and 1 or 2 bedrooms. Private houses with 1 to 3 bedrooms add washer/dryers and some also have sheds and garages. Backpacker's dorms have bunk beds, and shared kitchens and bathrooms. Some rooms add TVs and fridges.
 There's a game room and an Italian restaurant with a dining terrace overlooking a waterfall. Outdoor amenities include 2 dive centres, a pool and a playground, plus eco and boat tours.

title: Yardie Homestead
address: Yardie Creek Rd, Exmouth WA 6707, Australia

title: Bullara Station Stay
description: Down-to-earth lodge on a vast, remote cattle farm, featuring a petting zoo & outdoor showers.
address: Burkett Rd, Exmouth Gulf WA 6707, Australia
hotelDescription:
On a working cattle farm amid the sprawling grounds of more than 100,000 hectares, this casual, remote lodge in the outback is 25 km from the Exmouth Gulf shoreline and 78 km from the North West Coastal Highway.
 Accommodations range from low-key rooms with shared bathrooms, lounges and dining areas, to 3-bedroom cottages featuring living rooms, kitchens and en suite facilities.
 Amenities include fire pits, a petting zoo and outdoor showers, along with regular bush meals and happy hours. Fishing and snorkelling are offered. Minimum-stay rules may apply. Campsites are available.

title: Cape Range National Park
description: A protected wilderness landscape with a limestone plateau carved by rivers and pristine beaches.
address: Yardie Creek Rd, Cape Range National Park WA 6707, Australia

title: Ningaloo Lodge Exmouth
description: Casual guesthouse featuring a shared kitchen, a colorful garden & an outdoor pool.
hotelDescription:
This laid-back guesthouse in a garden setting off Murat Road is 3 km from bustling Town Beach. It’s also 8 km from the boating and swimming at Bundegi Coastal Park, and a 5-minute walk from Federation Park in the town center.
 Humble rooms offer free Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs and en suite, shower-only bathrooms. They also feature air-conditioning and minifridges.
 Parking is free. A shared kitchen with a refrigerator features a dining area. There’s a laid-back lounge, and a lush garden with a BBQ has terrace seating overlooking an outdoor pool. A game room has a dart board and a pool table.

title: Exmouth Escape Resort
description: Modern apartments and villas with kitchens, plus boat parking, storage and wash-down area.
hotelDescription:
This upscale resort is 1.9 km from Exmouth Game Fishing Club, 3.4 km from Ningaloo Pearls tours and 7 km from Exmouth Beach.
 Contemporary apartments and sophisticated 3-bedroom villas come with kitchens, laundry facilities and private balconies or terraces. Each unit has hardwood floors. Wi-Fi is available for a fee.
 Other amenities include a boat wash-down area, as well as boat parking and storage. There is a bar and a casual seafood restaurant with al fresco dining. The resort has an outdoor pool and a wading pool surrounded by gardens. Parking is free.

title: Town Beach
address: Pony Club, 65 Warne St, Exmouth WA 6707, Australia

title: Tim Hortons
description: Canadian chain for signature premium-blend coffee, plus light fare, pastries & breakfast sandwiches.
address: 775 Exmouth St, Sarnia, ON N7T 5P7, Canada

updatesFromCustomers.text:
I go to Tim's almost everyday, but for some reason they wouldn't give me a roll up cup when I  bought a  coffee, they said we only have a few left.
Normally they are pretty good but that really upset me.
